Name: Hong Kong Football Club
Tagline: As one of the finest sporting clubs in Asia, Hong Kong Football Club boasts superb facilities across a broad spectrum of competitive and recreational sports. One of the largest and most successful clu
About: Hong Kong Football Club is a prestigious institution offering a wide range of sports and recreational activities. Known for its superb facilities, it serves as a hub for both competitive athletes and recreational enthusiasts in Hong Kong.
Philosophy: The club emphasizes holistic development through sports, fostering teamwork, discipline, and sportsmanship. It aims to nurture talent across all ages, promoting a balanced and healthy lifestyle in the vibrant Hong Kong community.
Outcomes: Members of the Hong Kong Football Club frequently excel in local and international competitions, reflecting the club's commitment to high-level training. The club's athletes often achieve recognition in various sports, contributing to Hong Kong's sporting prestige.
Admissions: Prospective members can apply through the club's website, with applications reviewed on a rolling basis. Requirements include a nomination by current members, ensuring a community-focused and engaged membership base.
Quote: Unite in passion, excel through discipline, and inspire greatness on and off the field.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Main Soccer Sevens tournament has seen under 23 sides visiting from major clubs worldwide, including names such as Atletico Madrid, Aston Villa, Bayer Leverkusen, Brighton and Hove Albion, Celtic, Chelsea, Leicester City, Liverpool, Kashima Antlers, Manchester United, Manchester City, Newcastle United, Glasgow Rangers, Urawa Red Diamonds, West Ham United and Wolverhampton Wanderers. The event also features a Masters tournament that has seen participation from many famous international players of the past.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Of the 300-plus members in the Soccer Section, the vast majority are active playing members, either for one of the six competitive men's teams, the ladies team, one of three social sides, or HKFC Youth and Junior teams. The Club’s Junior Soccer programme is open to the Hong Kong community, members and non-members and more than 1,000 children and young people participate in the programme.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: HKFC Swimming and Triathlon Society offers competition, intensive training, technique improvement and social activities related to both swimming and triathlon. The Club’s 25-metre five-lane outdoor pool is open 11 months of the year and is divided into lanes for different swimming abilities and intensity of training.
Performance.Academic Integration: Hong Kong Football Club collaborates with local schools and international institutions to offer tailored sports programmes complementing the IB and DSE curricula. These programmes focus on integrating physical education with academic excellence, promoting a balanced development.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Athletes from Hong Kong Football Club have secured placements in top universities globally, aided by their outstanding performances in international competitions. The club boasts a high acceptance rate for sports scholarships at prestigious institutions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The club employs a rigorous review cycle, providing quarterly progress reports to members and parents to ensure continuous improvement. Regular feedback sessions and accreditation reviews maintain the club's high standards of training and development.
